race.description: Fore Design + Flex Planning Mdn Plate
race.comment: SCOOTATHEWOOTA (9) returns. Found some hot maidens in his debut prep and held his own. Readied with a trial and looks one of the main hopes. LATIBULATE (8) is a Royal Symphony gelding on debut for the Hardacre camp. Has come along nicely in his lead-up work and draws well for Pannell. Expecting a bright start. DEFY GRAVITY (3) was better in his second start but tired late. Fitter now and should find this a bit easier, though he will need a smart steer from out there. ET TU KIRKLISTON (4) has been thereabouts in his first two starts and should be further improved. Is another that is drawn sticky but deserves respect.
race.rail_position: +12m from 900m to WP, +12m from WP to 1800m, +9 metres Remainder. (Pent: 6.40)
